display.purpose: Hero h1 and primary section h2s. Print-masthead weight.

headline.purpose: Secondary section h2s in constrained columns or accordions.

title.purpose: Card titles, list-item h3/h4. Semibold, never display weight.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy. Line-height 1.7 is non-negotiable on the navy field.

label.purpose: Gold uppercase eyebrow above an h2. Cap at ~4 instances per page.

shadows.name: cta-gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Applied only to primary CTAs — the gold haze IS the affordance.

shadows.name: modal-gold-halo
shadows.purpose: Video lightbox modal shell only — creates a soft golden vignette.

motion.name: ease-house
motion.purpose: Default exponential easing for every state transition and reveal.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Final summary panel reveals after staggered children.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: The only button with the gold glow shadow. Used for the single most important action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #F5C200; color: #0F0D2E; height: 44px; padding: 0 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(245,194,0,0.35), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #FFD533; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F5C200; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary CTA Button
components.description: Outlined button for secondary actions. No shadow, transparent background.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #F0EEFF; height: 44px; padding: 0 1.25rem; border: 1.5px solid #F0EEFF; border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(240,238,255,0.08); }

components.name: Pill Badge (Gold)
components.description: Small status badge. Tinted background + 1px tinted border, never solid.
components.css: .ds-pill-gold { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.4rem; background: rgba(245,194,0,0.15); color: #F5C200; border: 1px solid rgba(245,194,0,0.3); border-radius: 100px; padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Default card surface. Flat (no shadow), 1px iris border, 14px radius. Hover treatment lifts via translateY only.
components.html:
Card Title

Card body copy goes here on the navy field.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #252275; border: 1px solid rgba(120,115,220,0.45); border-radius: 14px; padding: 1.5rem; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #F5C200; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: #F0EEFF; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #A09DD8; font-size: 0.9375rem; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Section Hero Heading
components.description: The signature h1/h2 pattern: gold uppercase eyebrow + Poppins 900 -0.03em headline.
components.html:
Section Label

A Confident Headline That Sets the Tone.
components.css: .ds-section-hero { text-align: center; max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; } .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #F5C200; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; margin: 0 0 1rem; } .ds-headline { font-family: 'Poppins', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 4.5vw, 2.5rem); letter-spacing: -0.03em; line-height: 1.15; color: #F0EEFF; margin: 0; }

components.name: Inline SVG Icon
components.description: Decorative inline SVG icon in a tinted square container. Replaces emoji-as-icon throughout.
components.css: .ds-icon-wrap { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: rgba(245,194,0,0.12); color: #F5C200; }

narrative.overview: Olark.ai dresses serious enterprise software in confident, almost editorial type. The page is dark not because dark looks tech but because the brand sells calm in a category full of shouting — a navy-saturated control room where the gold accent is rare enough to mean something. Every surface is a layer of indigo, every accent is a deliberate punctuation mark. The voice is operator-grade: short sentences, em-dashes used as breath, never as filler.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy palette layered for depth
Gold and pink used sparingly as semantic punctuation
Poppins 900 with tight letter-spacing for masthead headlines
Em-dashes treated as a brand-voice rhythm device

rules.name: The Punctuation Rule
rules.body: Filament Gold and Beacon Pink combined never cover more than ~10% of any visible viewport.

rules.name: The No-Black Rule
rules.body: #000 is forbidden. #FFFFFF is forbidden. Every neutral is hue-tinted toward indigo.

rules.name: The Single-Hue Doctrine
rules.body: The palette is one hue family (deep indigo) plus two accents. Resist any pull toward teal, lime, or 'tech blue'.

rules.name: The Em-Dash Rule
rules.body: Em-dashes are treated as a brand-voice rhythm device, not as an AI tell. Override impeccable's default ban for this project.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Restraint Rule
rules.body: Cap the gold uppercase section-label pattern at ~4 instances per page.

rules.name: The Tonal-Depth Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are elevated by stepping up the navy ramp, not by adding shadows.

rules.name: The Two-Shadow Doctrine
rules.body: Only two shadows exist: CTA gold glow and modal backdrop halo.

dos: Do use the navy ramp for depth instead of shadows
Do treat Filament Gold as semantic — it means action. Beacon Pink means signal
Do use Poppins 900 with -0.03em letter-spacing for every h1 and h2
Do cap line length at 65–75ch on long-form copy
Do use inline SVG for icons; lift CommercialIcon and extend the family before reaching for emoji
Do use em-dashes deliberately as a brand-voice rhythm device
Do ensure every interactive element meets WCAG AA touch targets (44×44px minimum)
donts: Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as a colored accent — the side-stripe is the most recognizable AI tell
Don't use bounce or elastic easing — only exponential cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)
Don't use glassmorphism / blur cards as decorative chrome
Don't copy the SaaS hero-metric template
Don't stack identical card grids more than twice on a single page
Don't use the section-label gold uppercase eyebrow more than 4 times on a single page
Don't have more than 3 terminal CTAs on a single page
